SciPy India

Discover events, read community updates, and stay connected with the local scientific Python ecosystem.

Get involved

Stay connected

Join the conversation, propose talks, and keep up with the broader SciPy India community between events.

  • Join our Zulip chat
  • Submit a talk proposal
  • Follow on Bluesky
  • Follow on Mastodon

If you want to help with organising, outreach, or review work, join our Zulip and say hello there first.

About the community

Built for meetups and conferences

SciPy India brings together researchers, students, practitioners, and open source contributors working across the scientific Python stack.
